title: Simple Mermaid Tails
description:
This Mod adds Mermaid Tails, thats it. 
This is kinda a fork from my Mako Mermaids Mod but without the Powers etc.
body:
This Mod is basically a fork of my Mako Mermaids Mod, but doesnt have the Powers, H2O Items etc.
I am just using the Mako Mod Tails for now and renamed them to:
- Light Tail (prev. Bella)
- Medium Tail (prev. H2O )
- Darkred Tail (prev. Mako )
- Merman Blue Tail (prev. Zac)

You will again be greeted with a GUI when Opening a World.
Here you can select your Tail Color, if you want to have positive status effects underwater, speedswim and autotransformation.

Commands:
/config opens the GUI
/select medium - Selects the medium color (same for other colors )
/dospeedswim true/false 
/ ( hm why dont I have toggle effects lol, need to add that later.. )

Textures by Reyeas
